Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Koromaru, you're so warm![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The kids are playing pretty[n]rough with Koromaru...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Don't get sick, okay, Koromaru? Lots of people haven't been looking so good lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}They say if you smile when you gargle, you won't get infected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}And if your feet get too cold, you'll catch depression, so bundle up when you sleep![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Okay, see you guys later![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Hehe, quite exciting over here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Well, it's been different around town lately, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}So many people with dead looks in their eyes, not to mention the wild stories going around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}I couldn't help but worry, so I came to check in on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}But it looks like I had nothing to worry about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}So that's enough of that for now. Next time, I'll bring some snacks, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lots of people are uneasy about the[n]bizarre events around the world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Whew, I'm beat. And it's been getting chillier, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Ah, right. Do you know how to play shogi, young man?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Ah, excellent, excellent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Then would you humor this old man with a game?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Is that so? Then Koromaru can lend you a helping paw.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}I can teach you. While we're at it, Koromaru can lend you a helping paw.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems like he's up for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Well, then, shall we begin?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}I don't have anyone to play with these days. This is going to be fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I played[n]shogi with the old man...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Heeey, hold it! Koro-chan, it's too early for that hint![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Oh, pardon us. We are right in front of the entrance, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Ah, of course. This is a student dorm, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Then does that mean you'll leave this place one day too, young man?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Well, Koromaru. Looks like the next batch of students will look after you, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Life may be filled with goodbyes, but they never get any easier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Ngh, so what? We're just getting started![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Whew, that was a good match. I'll have to stop by again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 21 0 5}Until next time, you two. And to that lovely lady over there... adieu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Moving out of the dorms... That would be some point after we finish our fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}It's hard to even imagine right now, but it's something we'll have to face in the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}After all, we're fighting so we can even have a future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}Oh, don't you worry, Koromaru. Everyone will love you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Oh no, my shogi pieces...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Shogi pieces are scattered on the[n]ground by the old man's feet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably help him out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I helped the old man[n]and walked him back to his home.[n]{f 1 1}
